why does paralysis do so much dmg
i feel like a paralysis team could be pretty good
If the target is already paralyzed then the next para dmg is x2
So your jenkin cards that deal 9 para dmg + 9 bleed
It will be 18 dmg with para
And it makes the poison + bleed x2 too
i was wondering why my jenkins did 30 bleed 30 poison from that one card
Because para makes his card x2
Any cards with para + other DoT effects will x2
